name: openai-smart-commit
description: Generate Jira Smart Commits (2 lines) with a custom prompt using OpenAI.

commands.title: OpenAI Smart Commit: Set Jira API Token

openaiSmartCommit.apiKey.markdownDescription: OpenAI API Key (или оставьте пустым и используйте переменную окружения OPENAI_API_KEY).

openaiSmartCommit.holisticMode.description: Holistic two-pass generation: analyze all changes first (JSON), then compose a single commit message

openaiSmartCommit.prompt.default:
You are an assistant generating a JIRA Smart Commit for Git. Input: branch name, list of changed files, and diff. If an issue key is provided externally it will be added; otherwise DO NOT include any issue key.

Determine `type` from files:
- infra: infra/, terraform/, *.tf, *.hcl, ansible/, k8s/, helm/, Dockerfile, .dockerignore
- ci: .github/workflows/, .gitlab-ci.yml, Jenkinsfile, azure-pipelines.yml
- docs: docs/, *.md, *.adoc, CHANGELOG*
- test: only tests/, __tests__/, *.test.*, *.spec.*
- feat: new public APIs/features, new endpoints/commands/flags
- fix: bug fixes, crashes, regressions
- refactor: restructure without behavior change
- chore: configs, deps, small non-behavioral tweaks
If multiple match, prefer: infra/ci > fix/feat > refactor/chore > docs/test. Use `scope` as top-level folder/component (api, web, infra, ci, db, auth). If unclear — omit parentheses.

OUTPUT FORMAT (tolerant, multi-line):
1) type(scope): <short English subject, 6–10 words, no period>  (if an issue key is externally provided, it will be prefixed before this)
2) 1–4 lines in Russian explaining what/why/impact (no tags, just text)
3) Final line only: #time <estimate placeholder>
Do NOT include #in-progress. Keep Russian lines concise (normal 12–18 words; detailed 18–30 words); mention key files/paths or env (prod/stage) when relevant.
Return only the lines above without extra prose or code fences.
openaiSmartCommit.prompt.markdownDescription: Custom system prompt (по умолчанию — Jira Smart Commit шаблон).

openaiSmartCommit.includeUntracked.description: Include untracked files: auto (only when nothing staged), always, or never

openaiSmartCommit.autoStage.description: Auto stage before generation: off, new (only untracked), or all (git add -A)

openaiSmartCommit.issuePicker.description: Show a Jira issue Quick Pick before generation

openaiSmartCommit.jira.apiToken.markdownDescription: Optional: Jira API token (prefer storing via command or env JIRA_API_TOKEN)

openaiSmartCommit.jira.jql.default: assignee = currentUser() AND resolution = Unresolved ORDER BY updated DESC
openaiSmartCommit.jira.jql.markdownDescription: JQL used to list issues in Quick Pick

openaiSmartCommit.jira.maxIssues.description: Max issues to fetch for Quick Pick

openaiSmartCommit.commentDetail.description: Controls #comment length: brief (8–12), normal (12–18), detailed (18–30) words

openaiSmartCommit.enforceDetailedComment.description: Post-process to ensure minimum words in #comment by adding concise details from files/env

openaiSmartCommit.minCommentWordsNormal.description: Minimum words for normal #comment if enforcement is enabled

openaiSmartCommit.minCommentWordsDetaile.description: Minimum words for detailed #comment if enforcement is enabled
